mental_emotional.text: Despondent, sensitive, easily offended, ill humored and taciturn

head.text: Pains cause depression. Shooting pain from above right temporal region. Pains from occiput to eyes. Words reverberate in ear to the root of nose. Periosteal pains due to venereal disease. Influenza. Scalp sensitive. Eruptions on face and upper lip. Moist eruption on scalp. Crusta lactea beginning in face

mouth_throat.text: Tongue white; aphthæ; salivation; metallic taste; no thirst. Fetid breath

stomach_abdomen.text: Rumbling and fermentation. Colic and backache at same time. Much flatus; cholera infantum

urinary.text: Urine scanty, slimy, flaky, sandy, bloody. Gravel. Renal colic. Severe pain at conclusion of urination. Urine dribbles while sitting. Bladder distended and tender. Child screams before and while passing urine. Sand on diaper. Renal colic and dysuria in infants. Pain from right kidney downward. Tenesmus of bladder; urine passes in thin, feeble stream. Pain at meatus

male.text: Bloody, seminal emissions. Intolerable stench on genitals. Herpetic eruption on genitals. Itching on scrotum and perineum. Syphilis; squamous eruption and bone pains

female.text: Nipples small, withered, retracted. Before menstruation, itching and humid eruption of forehead. Menses late and scanty. Moist eruption in right groin before menses

skin.text: Emaciated, shriveled, lies in folds (Abrot; Sanic), dry, flabby. Herpetic eruptions; ulcers. Rash from exposure to open air; dry, itching; comes on in spring; becomes crusty. Rhagades; skin cracked on hands and feet. Skin hard, indurated. Summer cutaneous affections

extremities.text: Paralytic, tearing pains. Trembling of hands and feet. Burning on sides of fingers and toes. Onychia, ulceration around ends of fingers, cutting sensation under nails. Rheumatism, bone pains; worse at night. Deep rhagades on fingers and toes; burn under nails. Tetter on hands; ulceration around ends of fingers (Psorin). Cutting sensation under nails (Petrol). Rheumatic pains after gonorrhœa

worse_from.text: dampness at night, after urinating, when yawning, in spring, before menses

keynotes.text: color="#800000">SARSAPARILLA OFFICINALIS Smilax (SARSAPARILLA) Renal colic; marasmus and periosteal pains due to venereal disease. Eruptions following hot weather and vaccinations; boils, and eczema. Urinary symptoms well marked.

generalities.text: (f-h1] Sarsaparilla [f.b1]. Vertigo when sitting and walking; the head tends to sink forwards (aft. 1/2 h.). {sars }. Head as if confused and stupid all the forenoon; in the afternoon cross and indisposed to do anything. A pressive headache like a great weight in the head; it tends to sink forwards. {sars }. Aching pain in the left side of the forehead. An aching pain in the forehead and occiput (aft. 1/2 h.). (f-h1]. Pressive pain on the left side of the head, particularly in the temple, when at rest and when moving. Slowly increasing pressure in the right frontal protuberance, accompanied by fine pricking. Slowly increasing and slowly declining pressive headache; chiefly in the upper part of the brain. Aching pressing pain in the forehead. Severe pressure in the right temple with drawing pain from the occiput to the forehead (aft. 1/2 h.). Acute fine pricks in the middle of the forehead (aft. 1 1/4 h.). Shooting pain in the left side of the occiput. Violent pressive-like tearing stitches in the right side of the head, which on account of their severity caused shivering (aft. 7 h.). Violent pressive shooting pain on the right side of the crown (aft. 3 h.). {Htn.]. Violent aching followed by shooting in the left frontal protuberance (aft. 1 h.). {sars }. Shooting pressive pain on the temporal bone increased by touching. {Hrr.]. Shooting tearing pain in the left side of the vertex. Pressive-like tearing in the whole left side of the head (aft. 7 h.). Shooting tearing on the left parietal bone, not altered by touching. Pressive tearing on several parts of the head, outwardly, more violent when moving and walking. Shooting drawing on the right mastoid process extending to the left frontal protuberance (aft. 2 h.). Shooting drawing on the right parietal and temporal bones (aft. 1/2 h.). ({Hrr.] {sars }. Pressive drawing on the right temporal bone and cartilage of the ear at the same time. {sars }. Dull shooting pain on the left frontal protuberance. Burning obtuse stitches on the left temporal bone. The pains on the head are aggravated by touching and walking. Eye affection : in the morning all objects hurt the eyes; everything he looks at by daylight gives him pain in the eyes; the eyelids are dry and as if inflamed; in the evening when reading by candlelight he has aching in the eyeball and white paper has a red appearance. Constant burning in the eyelids sometimes alternating with an aching pain in them. {sars }. As if mist were before the eyes; he has difficulty in reading (aft. 12 h.). ({Hrr.]. Dilatation of the pupils (aft. 2 h.). Ringing in the left ear. Violent aching and compression in the left ear, which seems to go into the temple and causes a pressing there (aft. 2 h.). Contractive sensation in the right ear (aft. 3 1/2 h.). Aching tearing pain in the cartilage of the right ear and external meatus. ({Hrr.]. Painful contraction on the right auricle. (A scab on the lobe of the ear, where there was at first a burning pain and afterwards itching) (aft. 19 d.). Obtuse shooting pain on the root of the right mastoid process, which went off when touched. Drawing (shooting) tearing pain in the masticating muscles of the right side which seemed to have spasmodically contracted themselves (aft. 4 1/2 h.). A fine pricking itching round the neck, on the shoulders, the face and hairy scalp, with feeling of increased warmth on those parts; scratching allayed it at one place, but it immediately recommenced on another part (aft. 2 1/2h.). A transient heat in the face with sweat on the forehead, heat on the chest and back, combined with needle-pricks from within outwards, most frequent and most severe on the neck. (An itching pimple on the cheek, with inflammation to a considerable extent round about it, with severe burning; a large thick scab came upon it, with tearing pain in the open air) (aft. 19 d.). Pustules on the face, without sensation. (Epistaxis). [Brunner, in Rahn's Magazin, i, vi, p.545.]. Little pocks on the upper lip. [Brunner, I.c.]. Pressive shooting pain on the lower and inner border of the lower jaw on the right side, but only when touched and when bending back the head (aft. 33 h.). {sars }. Aching painful stitches in the thyroid cartilage, which, however, do not interfere with swallowing. Aching shooting pain in the cervical muscles, aggravated by touching and moving. {sars }. Violent, long-continued, drawing stitches in the cervical muscles of the right side, from the clavicle to the os hyoides (aft. 2 3/4 h.). (f-h1]. Shooting tearing pain in the gum and root of the last lower right molar. {Hrr.]. Aching drawing pain in the soft palate. Nauseous, herbaceous taste in the mouth. In the morning a nasty sour slimy taste like fermented dough in the throat. Bitter taste of bread. No appetite and no hunger, food has too little taste, and when he had eaten, he felt in his stomach as if he had not eaten, just as though the stomach were insensible. He felt loathing when he thought of the food he had eaten. A nauseous exhalation comes from below up into the mouth, that causes nausea in the throat, with confusion of the head. A constant, incomplete (not rising up into the mouth) eructation (immediately). {sars }. Though he eats but little it distends his stomach, just as though he had eaten a great quantity. In the moming, great nausea even to vomiting, with increased, sickly, herbaceous taste in the mouth. After dinner, nausea, and then exhaustion. Aching pain just below the ensiform cartilage and in the scrobiculus cordis, aggravated by touching. Severe pinching in the abdomen (aft. 1/2 h.), followed by a painful contraction of the sphincter muscle of the anus. Aching drawing pain in the abdomen, as after a chill (aft. 1 h.). Painful inward pressure and pinching in the left side of the abdomen, on a small spot, aggravated by deep breathing, unaffected by touch (aft. 4 h.). ({Htn.]. Rumbling in the abdomen, and sensation of emptiness in it (aft. 4 h.). ({Hrr.]. Sensation of emptiness in the whole abdomen, which causes a gurgling and rumbling. { }. Pinching in the left iliac region. Call to stool, but no evacuation. First the abdominal intestines are drawn together, and though he has a great call to stool he is unable to evacuate, and he must wait some time on the night stool, with excessive pressure downwards, as if the bowels would be forced out; then something is evacuated with a jerk, but with great smarting and cutting in the rectum, and immediately thereafter another stool, as if the rectum would be pressed out, so that he can hardly sit for pain. The first day hard stool, the second day constipation, the third day evacuation first of hard then of soft feces. In the night he is awakened by a sore pain at the anus, which changes into a (burning) itching, that lasts all day. He has call to urinate and pressing and forcing in the bladder (strangury), and yet the urine will not pass; when at last the urine passes, it cuts. Almost all day he has urging to make water, but little urine passes. Without any particular thirst, he passes urine more frequently than usual, and each time (with the exception of the first day) daily in larger quantity, the longer he took the medicine, and also for 48 hours afterwards. More frequent and more copious micturition (aft. 4 and more h.). Every morning he is awakened from sleep by urging to urinate, even after 24, 48 hours. The urine passes without being felt in the urinary passages, as after taking a diuretic drink. (When the urine has been discharged there is pain like burning and itching tearing from the glans to the root of the penis.). Burning when urinating, with discharge of long flakes. [Brunner, l.c.]. Severe strangury, as in stone in the bladder, with discharge of white, acrid, opaque matter with mucus. [Brunner, l.c.]. Painful constriction of the bladder, with urging to urinate. (Coryza and cough.). Pressive drawing pain on the clavicle, close to the sternum (aft. 8 h.). ({Hrr.]. Pressive pain on the sternum, increased by touching (aft. 2 h.). Stitches on the centre of the chest, near the sternum, without relation to inspiration or expiration. Stitches in the right side of the chest, not affected by inspiration or expiration. {sars }. Aching shooting pain under the last true ribs. Palpitation of the heart, frequently, by day. Small violent stitches in the middle of the spine between the scapulae (aft. 14 1/2 h.). { sars }. Tearing shooting pain worming down from the scapulae to the lowest false rib, much more severe on inspiration; on breathing deeply the breath is quite stopped by it (aft. 9 h.). {sars }. Shooting pain near the spinal column, from the right scapula to the last false rib; much more severe on inspiration. A pulse-like, intermittent, shooting, transient, outward pain on the upper arm near the shoulder-joint. Obtuse shooting pain on the upper and anterior part of the humerus. {sars }. Paralytic tearing pain on the inner side of the forearm, near the elbow- joint. ({Hrr.] {sars }. Paralytic tearing on the right forearm, especially on the elbow-joint, more severe when at rest than when moving. Pressive tearing pain on the right ulna, which sometimes extends to the metacarpal bones. Pressive shooting pain on the ulna, in the muscles of both forearms. ({Hrr.]. Drawing shooting tearing on the muscles of the inner side of the left forearm (aft. 1 1/2 h.). Tearing stitches over the left wrist-joint, upwards. Tearing pain over the upper aspect of the left wrist-joint, which goes on with drawing tearing stitches to the fourth finger (aft. 2 h.). Cold hands, colder towards the tips of the fingers (for eight days). Pain in the right wrist-joint as if the hand were dislocated, which seemed to extend towards the fourth finger. (Pain in the left hand, without swelling.) [Brunner, l.c.]. In the first joint of the thumb, a pain as from innumerable pins, afterwards the part was painful to the touch. Pressive-like shooting in the muscles of the left thumb, when at rest and when moving. Small pricks in the proximal joint of the right little finger (aft. 2 1/2 h.). Drawing tearing in the fourth finger of the right hand through the bones, increased by moving the joints. Intermittent pressive shooting pain on the metacarpal bones of the right index finger (for two days). When he presses with the finger tips they are painful as if gathering, or as when salt gets into a wound. Pressive shooting pain on the right ischium, in every position. Pressive though painless heaviness in the left thigh, when sitting and walking (aft. 2 1/4h.). Dull pressive pain on the right thigh, a little above the hough, when sitting (aft. 3 1/2 h.). { sars }. Shooting pressive pain on the left thigh, not far from the patella (aft. 9 h.). {sars }. Pressive pain on the inner side of the left thigh near the knee-joint. ({Hrr.]. Pressive tearing pain on the thigh near the knee-joint, upwards and outwards (aft. 13 h.). {sars }. Single, acute, fine pricks on the inner side of the left knee. Aching drawing shooting pain over the right knee (aft. 1/2 h.). Dull drawing pain upwards over the right tibia (aft. 3 h.). Tearing pain in the muscles of the right leg (aft. 3 1/2 h.). (f-h1]. Pin-pricks above the right outer ankle, forwards. A painful drawing changing into twitching on the dorsum of the right foot (aft. 7 1/2 h.). { sars }. (Pain on the right tarsus with swelling and redness which was increased at 2 p.m.). [Brunner, l.c.]. Drawing tearing in the right big toe (aft. 4 1/2 h.). Painful pressive throbbing and throbbing-shooting on the inner side of the right sole, but afterwards on the whole sole, when sitting (aft. 2, 6 h.). ({Htn.]. Itching on the forearm to the hand, and on the inner side of the knee, above the hough, especially in the evening in bed. (Every evening before going to bed, an itching, that goes off in bed.). A pricking itching all over the body, in the evening from 5 to 7 o'clock, and in the morning on rising. When he goes from the warm room into the cold air, miliary papules appear. Burning itching all over the body, with rigor. (Burning) itching on the abdomen and thighs. [fth1]. Red pimples the size of a pin's head, without moisture, on the back and thighs; they itch (eroding) only in the warmth; the itching went off by scratching, without leaving any other sensation, but only for a short time (aft. 8 h.). At night, waking up as from a startling noise. Frightful dreams during profound sleep. Restless sleep, dreams of misfortunes (aft. 72 h.). A shivering that spreads from below upwards, all over the body. Inward chilliness and drowsiness. Chilliness all over the body, except the face and chest which were unusually warm; the other parts of the body are cold, even when near the stove. {sars }. In the evening in bed, one hour before falling asleep, he becomes so hot, that the blood boils, the heart palpitates, and sweat stands on the forehead (for two successive evenings). At night in bed, severe chilliness, especially on the feet, which are very cold, whilst the face and chest are hot. Distraught disposition. Silent crossness. Extremely cross; the flies on the wall annoy him. Sullen humour, and yet disposed to work. Sullen and yet disposed to work. Every word can offend him. SCILLA (Squill)
